description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script of the build job, log in to Docker Hub by echoing $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD into docker login -u $DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN --password-stdin, then create a BuildKit builder with docker buildx create --driver=docker-container --name=buildkit-builder --use. In the script step run make. No caches, artifacts, or deployments are defined.
